_publications._publicationTitle: An inflammatory gene signature distinguishes neurofibroma Schwann cells and macrophages from cells in the normal peripheral nervous system.

_contextSnippet: We sorted F4/80 + ;CD11b + macrophages in three independent experiments
resourceName: anti-mouse monoclonal antibodies against CD11b (8G12/HPCA-2, Becton–Dickinson)
details: Successfully used for FACS sorting of macrophages from neurofibroma tissue, enabling identification of F4/80+;CD11b+ macrophage populations
